attempts.response:
```spthy
theory RFID_Auth_Protocol_P
begin

builtins: hashing

/* 
  Roles:
    - Tag(tid, ~k): stores evolving secret key k; computes r2 = h(<r1, k, s>) and later verifies r3.
    - Reader(tid, ~Kcur, ~Klast): generates challenge s; identifies key by checking r2 against h(<r1, Kcur, s>) or h(<r1, Klast, s>); updates DB when matched on Kcur; sends r3 = h(<r2, k, s>).
    - Compromise(tid, k): optional leakage of the tag's secret key.

  Messages:
    1) Reader -> Tag: s
    2) Tag -> Reader: <r1, r2> where r2 = h(<r1, k, s>)
    3) Reader -> Tag: r3' where r3' = h(<r2, k, s>)
    4) Tag checks r3' = r3, and on success would update k := h(k) (modeled via events).

  Primitives:
    - Hashing h/1
    - Concatenation modeled by pairing <...>
  
  Intended security goals:
    - Secrecy of the tag's secret key k unless an explicit KeyReveal(tid) occurs.
    - Reader authenticates the Tag: if Reader commits on (tid,s,r1,r2), then a matching Tag run existed (or key was revealed).
    - Tag authenticates the Reader: if Tag commits on (tid,s,r1,r2), then a matching Reader commit existed (or key was revealed).
*/

let Tag(~k, tid) =
  in(s);
  new r1;
  let r2 = h(<r1, ~k, s>) in
  event TagUsesKey(tid, ~k);
  event TagRunning(tid, s, r1, r2);
  out(<r1, r2>);
  in(r3p);
  let r3 = h(<r2, ~k, s>) in
  if r3p = r3 then
    event TagCommit(tid, s, r1, r2);
    event TagUpdatePlanned(tid, h(~k))
  else
    event TagReject(tid, s, r1, r2)


let Reader(~Kcur, ~Klast, tid) =
  new s;
  event ReaderNewS(tid, s);
  out(s);
  in(<r1, r2>);
  event ReaderRecv(tid, s, r1, r2);
  if r2 = h(<r1, ~Kcur, s>) then
    event ReaderFoundKey(tid, 'cur');
    let r3p = h(<r2, ~Kcur, s>) in
    out(r3p);
    event ReaderCommit(tid, s, r1, r2);
    event ReaderUpdateDB(tid, <'Klast': ~Kcur, 'Kcur': h(~Kcur)>)
  else
    if r2 = h(<r1, ~Klast, s>) then
      event ReaderFoundKey(tid, 'last');
      let r3p = h(<r2, ~Klast, s>) in
      out(r3p);
      event ReaderCommit(tid, s, r1, r2)
    else
      event ReaderNoMatch(tid, s, r1, r2);
      out('err')


let Compromise(tid, k) =
  event KeyReveal(tid);
  out(k)


process:
new ~k0;
let tid = 'T' in
(
  !Tag(~k0, tid)
| !Reader(~k0, 'init', tid)
| ( Compromise(tid, ~k0) )
)


/* Executability: a successful run where both sides commit */
lemma executability:
  exists-trace
  "Ex tid s r1 r2 #i #j.
      ReaderCommit(tid, s, r1, r2) @ #i
    & TagCommit(tid, s, r1, r2) @ #j
    & #i < #j
    & not (Ex #r. KeyReveal(tid) @ #r)
  "


/* Secrecy of the tag's secret key unless it is explicitly revealed */
lemma key_secrecy:
  "All tid k #i.
      TagUsesKey(tid, k) @ #i
    ==> not (Ex #j. K(k) @ #j)
        | (Ex #r. KeyReveal(tid) @ #r)
  "


/* Reader authenticates Tag: a Reader commit implies a prior Tag run unless key was revealed */
lemma auth_Tag_to_Reader:
  "All tid s r1 r2 #i.
      ReaderCommit(tid, s, r1, r2) @ #i
    ==> (Ex #j. TagRunning(tid, s, r1, r2) @ #j & #j < #i)
        | (Ex #r. KeyReveal(tid) @ #r)
  "


/* Tag authenticates Reader: a Tag commit implies a prior Reader commit unless key was revealed */
lemma auth_Reader_to_Tag:
  "All tid s r1 r2 #i.
      TagCommit(tid, s, r1, r2) @ #i
    ==> (Ex #j. ReaderCommit(tid, s, r1, r2) @ #j & #j < #i)
        | (Ex #r. KeyReveal(tid) @ #r)
  "

end
```
